CatalogTemplateRequest.Property.Value:
<!--freetext--> <!--Recommendations include: All-In-One Micro Tower Mini Desktop Mini Tower Nettop Small Form Factor (SFF) Tower Ultra Small Form Factor (USFF) -->
<xsl:variable name="formFactor" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='DESKTOPFORMFACT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose>
<xsl:when test="$formFactor='Small Form Factor'"> <xsl:text>Small Form Factor (SFF)</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$formFactor='Ultra Small Form Factor (USFF)'"> <xsl:text>Ultra Small Form Factor (USFF)</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='DESKTOPFORMFACT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> </xsl:otherwise>
</xsl:choose>

<!--freetext, recommendations include: HDD (Hard Disk Drive) HDD + SSD SSD (Solid State Drive) SSHD (Solid State Hybrid Drive)-->
<!--freetext--> <xsl:value-of select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDTYPEHWARE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="size" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$size >= 1000"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size div 1000, '#.#'), 'TB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size, '#.#'), 'GB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat($size * 1000 , 'MB')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose>

<!--SelectionOnly Yes No--> <xsl:variable name="kbInc" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='KEYBOARDINCL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="mouseInc" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='MOUSEINCL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$kbInc != 'NO' or $mouseInc != 'NO' " > <xsl:text>Yes</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise><xsl:text>No</xsl:text></xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="type" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDTYPEHWARE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="size" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="contains($type, 'HDD') "> <xsl:text>Not Applicable</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1000"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size div 1000, '#.#'), 'TB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number($size, '#.#'), 'GB')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$size < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat($size * 1000 , 'MB')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose>

<!--freetext, recommendations include Dedicated Graphics Integrated/On-Board Graphics Hybrid Graphics Dedizierte Grafik Integrierte Grafik Hybrid-Grafik-->
<!--Dedicated|Integrated|Hybrid--> <xsl:variable name="gpuType" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="map"> <item code="Dedicated">Dedicated Graphics</item> <item code="Dedicated">Dedizierte Grafik</item> <item code="Integrated">Integrated/On-Board Graphics</item> <item code="Integrated">Integrierte Grafik</item> <item code="Hybrid">Hybrid Graphics</item> <item code="Hybrid">Hybrid-Grafik</item> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:value-of select="msxsl:node-set($map)/item[@code=$gpuType]"/>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="dvi" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTALDVI']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="hdmi" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDMI']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="headphone" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='HDPHNJACK']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="microphone" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='MICPHNJACK']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usb2" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBPRT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usb3" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBPWR']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="usbC" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='USBCPORTS']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="vga" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='VGA']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="lan" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='LANCOMPAT']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="pci1x" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='AVAILPCIX1']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="pci8x" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='AVAILPCIX8']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="pci16x" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='AVAILPCIX16']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="ext35Bays" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTAL35EXTBAY']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="int35Bays" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTAL35INTBAY']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="hotswapBays" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTALHOTSWAP']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="totalExpBays" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='TOTALEXPBAY']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="outputFragmentCollection"> <xsl:if test="$hdmi > 0"> <data> <xsl:text>HDMI port</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usb2 > 0"> <data> <xsl:text>USB 2.0</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usb3 > 0"> <data> <xsl:text>USB 3.0</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$usbC > 0"> <data> <xsl:text>USB-C</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$ext35Bays > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$ext35Bays" /> <xsl:text> External 3.5" Expansion Bay</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$ext35Bays > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$int35Bays > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$int35Bays" /> <xsl:text> Internal 3.5" Expansion Bay</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$int35Bays > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$hotswapBays > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$hotswapBays" /> <xsl:text> Hot Swap Bay</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$hotswapBays > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$totalExpBays > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$totalExpBays" /> <xsl:text> Total Expansion Bay</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$totalExpBays > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$pci1x > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$pci1x" /> <xsl:text> PCIe 1x Expansion Slot</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$pci1x > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$pci8x > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$pci8x" /> <xsl:text> PCIe 8x Expansion Slot</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$pci8x > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if> <xsl:if test="$pci16x > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$pci16x" /> <xsl:text> PCIe 16x Expansion Slot</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$pci8x > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$dvi > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$dvi" /> <xsl:text> DVI output</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$dvi > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$microphone > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$headphone" /> <xsl:text> Microphone Jack</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$headphone > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$headphone > 0"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$headphone" /> <xsl:text> Headphone Jack</xsl:text> <xsl:if test="$headphone > 1"> <xsl:text>s</xsl:text> </xsl:if> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$vga > 0"> <data> <xsl:text>VGA</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$lan != 'No Wired Ethernet/LAN'"> <data> <xsl:value-of select="$lan" /> <xsl:text> Wired LAN</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:for-each select="msxsl:node-set($outputFragmentCollection)/*[. != '']"> <xsl:if test="position() > 1"><xsl:text>|</xsl:text></xsl:if> <xsl:value-of select="."/>
</xsl:for-each>

<!--freetext--> <xsl:variable name="epeat" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='EPEATLVL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="opticalDrive" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='OPTDR1']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="bluetoothVer" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BLUETOOTHVER']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuCores" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUCORE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuCache" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUCACHE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuSpeed" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUSPEED']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cpuNumber" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='CPUNUM']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="cardsRead" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='MEDIACARDREADER']/q:Value" /> <xsl:variable name="liquidCooling" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='LIQUIDCOOL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="bluRayReaderSpeed" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='BLUSPD']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="dvdSpeed" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='DVDSPD']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="ramType" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='RAMTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="gpuModel" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUMODEL']/q:Value/a:string[1]" /> <xsl:variable name="gpuMemory" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUSIZE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="cpuCoresPhrasing" > <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$cpuCores='1'"> <xsl:text>Single-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='2'"> <xsl:text>Dual-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='3'"> <xsl:text>Triple-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='4'"> <xsl:text>Quad-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='6'"> <xsl:text>6-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCores='8'"> <xsl:text>8-core </xsl:text> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="cpuCachePhrasing" >
<xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="$cpuCache > 0 and $cpuCache < 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(' w/ ', $cpuCache * 1000, ' KB cache')" /> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$cpuCache >= 1"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(' w/ ', $cpuCache, ' MB cache')" /> </xsl:when> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:variable name="outputFragmentCollection"> <xsl:if test="contains($gpuModel, 'Graphics') and $gpuModel != 'Attribute Not Listed' and $gpuMemory > 0"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($gpuMemory, ' MB ', $gpuModel, ' Device')" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="not(contains($gpuModel, 'Graphics')) and $gpuModel != 'Attribute Not Listed' and $gpuMemory > 0"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($gpuMemory, ' MB ', $gpuModel, ' Graphics Device')" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="not(contains($cardsRead, 'Not Applicable')) "> <data> <xsl:for-each select="msxsl:node-set($cardsRead )/*[. != '']"> <xsl:if test="position() > 1"><xsl:text>/</xsl:text></xsl:if> <xsl:value-of select="."/> </xsl:for-each> <xsl:text> Memory Reader</xsl:text> </data> </xsl:if>
<Value><xsl:value-of select="concat($ramType, ' Memory Standard Supported') " /></Value>
<xsl:if test="$bluRayReaderSpeed != '0/0/0'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($bluRayReaderSpeed, ' BluRay drive')" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$dvdSpeed != '0/0/0' and $opticalDrive != 'Not Applicable'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat($dvdSpeed, ' ', $opticalDrive)" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$epeat != 'Not Applicable'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat('EPEAT ', $epeat, ' certified energy efficient')" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$liquidCooling != 'NO'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="'Liquid Cooling System'" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<xsl:if test="$bluetoothVer != 'No Bluetooth'"> <Value> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Bluetooth ', $bluetoothVer)" /> </Value> </xsl:if>
<Value> <!--2.4 GHz Dual-core A123M processor--> <!--3.6 GHz Quad-core i5-3450 processor with 5 MB cache--> <xsl:value-of select="concat($cpuSpeed, ' GHz ', $cpuCoresPhrasing, ' ', $cpuNumber, ' cpu', $cpuCachePhrasing)" /> </Value> </xsl:variable>
<xsl:for-each select="msxsl:node-set($outputFragmentCollection)/*[. != '']"> <xsl:if test="position() > 1"><xsl:text>|</xsl:text></xsl:if> <xsl:value-of select="."/> </xsl:for-each>

<xsl:variable name="qLifestyle" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='PCLIFESTYLE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:variable name="qGraphics" select="q:Catalog/q:Attributes/q:Attribute[q:Code='GPUTYPE']/q:Value/a:string[1]" />
<xsl:choose>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Business' and $qGraphics = 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Workstation</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Business' and $qGraphics != 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Office</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Home & Student' and $qGraphics = 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Graphic Design</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Home & Student' and $qGraphics != 'Dedicated' "> <xsl:text>Engineering Coding</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Gaming'"> <xsl:text>Gaming</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Entertainment'"> <xsl:text>Casual Computing</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Mobile'"> <xsl:text>Casual Computing</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
<xsl:when test="$qLifestyle='Server'"> <xsl:text>Industrial</xsl:text> </xsl:when>
</xsl:choose>
